description: Letter fragment in Arabic script. Mentions "his pure intention with me, in the document/petition" (من نيته الخالصة لي في الرقعة) and then "... the document/petition to your noble presence..." (الرقعة الى  جلال حضرته) and then "if God makes our meeting successful..." (وان وفق الله اجتماعنا). Reused on recto for literary/liturgical text in Hebrew. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
